Polyaspartic is also UV stable compared to epoxy.Visit our Resources page to learn more."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"Are floor coatings slippery?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"All of our floor coatings have a standard amount of anti-slip texture within the topcoat.There are different levels of grit we can aim to achieve depending on the space. However, it’s important to remember that any hard surface can be slippery when wet."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How long does it take to install a concrete floor coating?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Concrete floor coatings generally take 1 day to install for most spaces.However, size and condition of concrete can vary and may require a multi-day project. At time of consultation, we will provide a time completion estimate."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How much does a concrete floor coating cost?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"A concrete coating can range anywhere from $7 – $13 per square foot, depending on the size of the space, concrete condition, materials, and other variables."}}]}],"@id":"https://level10coatings.com/#schema-174997","isPartOf":{"@id":"https://level10coatings.com/#webpage"},"publisher":{"@id":"https://level10coatings.com/#organization"},"inLanguage":"en-US","mainEntityOfPage":{"@id":"https://level10coatings.com/#webpage"}}]}

Serving Northern Indiana, Chicagoland, and Southwest Michigan.","uploadDate":"2025-03-12T04:04:35-06:00","contentUrl":"https://videos.gotolstoy.com/public/84e9c770-a470-4e2c-bcad-a1a4ac2df52e/704b39b9-b980-48e8-ab53-cab22e4cf17e/704b39b9-b980-48e8-ab53-cab22e4cf17e_preview_embed.mp4","isFamilyFriendly":"True","subjectOf":[{"@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[{"@type":"Question","name":"Can I Use Epoxy Coating On A Painted Basement Floor?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"In most cases, epoxy shouldn\u2019t be applied directly over a painted basement floor. Paint creates a weak bonding layer, and epoxy relies on strong adhesion to bare, properly prepared concrete. For any coating system to perform correctly, the concrete typically needs to be mechanically prepared to remove paint, sealers and contaminants.Polyurea coatings are designed to bond more aggressively to properly prepared concrete and are better suited for below-grade spaces where moisture conditions can vary. This is one reason professional basement floor coatings often use polyurea-based systems rather than traditional epoxy."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How Do You Coat A Basement Floor Properly?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Coating a basement floor correctly involves much more than rolling on a product. A proper process typically includes:Evaluating the concrete for moisture, cracks and previous coatingsMechanical surface preparation using professional grinding equipmentRepairing cracks and surface imperfectionsApplying a moisture-resistant base coat designed for concreteAdding decorative flakes or texture, if desiredSealing everything with a durable topcoat for protection and tractionSkipping preparation steps or using the wrong materials can lead to premature failure. That\u2019s why basement floors benefit from coating systems specifically engineered for concrete environments, not DIY floor paints or standard epoxy kits."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"Will Groundwater Lift Polymer Coatings Off A Basement Floor?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Groundwater and hydrostatic pressure can cause coating failure if the wrong materials are used or the floor is not properly prepared. Traditional epoxy coatings are more likely to soften or lose adhesion when exposed to moisture from below the slab.High-performance polymer systems are designed to bond more aggressively to concrete and tolerate moisture conditions better than standard epoxy. That said, no coating can fix active water intrusion issues. Addressing drainage or foundation problems is always the first step before coating a basement floor."}}]}],"@id":"https://level10coatings.com/residential/basement-flooring/#schema-147820","isPartOf":{"@id":"https://level10coatings.com/residential/basement-flooring/#webpage"},"publisher":{"@id":"https://level10coatings.com/#organization"},"inLanguage":"en-US","mainEntityOfPage":{"@id":"https://level10coatings.com/residential/basement-flooring/#webpage"}},{"@type":"VideoObject","name":"\u200bBasement Floor Coatings | Level 10 Coatings","description":"Transform your basement with durable, 1-day polyurea and polyaspartic coatings.
